title: Sarepta Therapeutics Q4 2024 and Full Year Earnings Call Summary - Record Gene Therapy Launch
text:
Sarepta surpassed Wall Street expectations with Q4 2024 results showing an EPS of $1.9 against a forecast of $1.54. The company's revenue reached $658.4 million, exceeding the anticipated $589.45 million.

Full Year 2024 Performance: Net product revenues of $638 million in Q4, a 75% increase over the same quarter the previous year. Full-year 2024 revenue: $1.8 billion, up 56% year-over-year. Both quarters showed profitability on GAAP and non-GAAP bases.

ELEVIDYS Milestone: ELEVIDYS had the most successful gene therapy launch in history, with fourth-quarter sales of $384 million, representing a 112% increase over the prior sequential quarter. Full-year 2024 ELEVIDYS sales exceeded $1 billion since initial approval in 2023. Current treatment penetration: approximately 5% of on-label addressable patient population.

CEO Statement: CEO Doug Ingram stated: In 2024, we had, by a wide margin, the most successful launch of a gene therapy yet in history.

2025 Guidance: Total Net Product Revenue Guidance: $2.9 billion to $3.1 billion, representing approximately 70% year-over-year growth. About one-third from PMO franchise (exon-skipping therapies). Over two-thirds from ELEVIDYS. ELEVIDYS specifically projected to grow over 160% year-over-year.

Full-Year 2024 Results: The company generated strong cash flow and maintained a robust financial position supporting further growth investments.
